trans-unit.source: Click to view in the skill window

trans-unit.id: Capri pants (also known as three quarter pants, capris, crop pants, pedal pushers, clam-diggers, flood pants, jams, highwaters, culottes, or toreador pants) are pants that are longer than shorts but are not as long as trousers.
trans-unit.source: Capri pants (also known as three quarter pants, capris, crop pants, pedal pushers, clam-diggers, flood pants, jams, highwaters, culottes, or toreador pants) are pants that are longer than shorts but are not as long as trousers.
trans-unit.target: Eine Caprihose (auch bekannt als Dreiviertelhose) ist eine Hose, die länger ist als Shorts, aber nicht so lang wie eine normale Hose.

trans-unit.id: Dorky sombrero that doesn't fit anyone. You feel embarrassed to wear it.
trans-unit.source: Dorky sombrero that doesn't fit anyone. You feel embarrassed to wear it.
trans-unit.target: Dämlicher Sombrero, der niemandem passt. Peinlich, so etwas zu tragen.

trans-unit.id: Cool piratey shirt that makes your biceps look bigger than they really are.
trans-unit.source: Cool piratey shirt that makes your biceps look bigger than they really are.
trans-unit.target: Cooles Piratenshirt, das deinen Bizeps größer aussehen lässt als er wirklich ist.

trans-unit.id: Basic, ordinary, every day, run of the mill, nondescript, conventional, commonplace, humdrum, standard, middle-of-the-road, garden-variety low-top shoes.
trans-unit.source: Basic, ordinary, every day, run of the mill, nondescript, conventional, commonplace, humdrum, standard, middle-of-the-road, garden-variety low-top shoes.
trans-unit.target: Einfache, gewöhnliche, unscheinbare, konventionelle, alltagstaugliche, fast langweilige, 08/15 standard Halbschuhe.

trans-unit.id: The hair with a completely normal amount of flare.
trans-unit.source: The hair with a completely normal amount of flare.
trans-unit.target: Das Haar mit ganz gewöhnlichem Glanz.

trans-unit.id: The haircut your mom always made you get before you realized you could make your own decisions.
trans-unit.source: The haircut your mom always made you get before you realized you could make your own decisions.
trans-unit.target: Die Frisur, die deine Mutter dir immer gemacht hat, bevor du selber entscheiden konntest.

trans-unit.id: Knee-high boots are boots that rise to the knee, or slightly thereunder. They are generally tighter around the leg shaft and ankle than at the top.
trans-unit.source: Knee-high boots are boots that rise to the knee, or slightly thereunder. They are generally tighter around the leg shaft and ankle than at the top.
trans-unit.target: Kniehohe Stiefel sind Stiefel, die ungefähr bis zu den Knien gehen. An den Waden und Fußgelenken sind sie enger als an den Knien.

trans-unit.id: Sturdy pair of slim-fit pants. Trousers are an item of clothing worn from the waist to the ankles, covering both legs separately (rather than with cloth extending across both legs as in robes, skirts, and dresses).
trans-unit.source: Sturdy pair of slim-fit pants. Trousers are an item of clothing worn from the waist to the ankles, covering both legs separately (rather than with cloth extending across both legs as in robes, skirts, and dresses).
trans-unit.target: Robuste, enge Hose. Eine Hose ist ein Kleidungsstück, das beide Beine jeweils einzeln bedeckt und von der Hüfte bis zu den Knöcheln reicht (im Gegensatz zu Roben, Röcken und Kleidern, deren Stoff beide Beine zusammen bedeckt).

trans-unit.id: Lighter pack that causes lower calorie consumption.
trans-unit.source: Lighter pack that causes lower calorie consumption.
trans-unit.target: Leichterer Rucksack, der zu niedrigerem Kalorienverbrauch führt.

trans-unit.id: A trussed roast baked to perfection.
trans-unit.source: A trussed roast baked to perfection.

trans-unit.id: A dense whole wheat unleavened bread.
trans-unit.source: A dense whole wheat unleavened bread.

trans-unit.id: A seemingly random assortment of wild plants that form a sort of salad.
trans-unit.source: A seemingly random assortment of wild plants that form a sort of salad.
trans-unit.target: Eine scheinbar zufällige Auswahl an Wildpflanzen, die eine Art Salat bilden.

trans-unit.id: Smashed beans can work as a thickener or flavour enhancer.
trans-unit.source: Smashed beans can work as a thickener or flavour enhancer.
trans-unit.target: Zerdrückte Bohnen können als Andickungsmittel oder Geschmacksverstärker genutzt werden.

trans-unit.id: Just because the name has 'bear' in it doesn't mean it actually contains bear.
trans-unit.source: Just because the name has 'bear' in it doesn't mean it actually contains bear.
trans-unit.target: Nur weil "Bär" im Namen vorkommt, ist noch lange kein Bär drin.

trans-unit.id: A brilliantly colored bulb with an earthy sweetness.
trans-unit.source: A brilliantly colored bulb with an earthy sweetness.
trans-unit.target: Eine prächtig farbige Knolle mit einer erdigen Süße.

trans-unit.id: Boiled sausages might not be as pretty as grilled ones, but they're still tasty.
trans-unit.source: Boiled sausages might not be as pretty as grilled ones, but they're still tasty.
trans-unit.target: Gekochte Würste sind zwar nicht so schön wie gebratene, aber sie schmecken dennoch gut.

trans-unit.id: A delicious, crispy crust hides the soft interior.
trans-unit.source: A delicious, crispy crust hides the soft interior.
trans-unit.target: Eine leckere, knusprige Kruste versteckt das weiche Innere.

trans-unit.id: A bread with a camas twist for a bit of flavor and fun.
trans-unit.source: A bread with a camas twist for a bit of flavor and fun.
trans-unit.target: Ein Brot mit Prärielilien als kleine Überraschung, für ein bisschen Geschmack und Spaß.

trans-unit.id: A spread of evenly baked camas bulbs; soft in the middle, golden brown on the outside.
trans-unit.source: A spread of evenly baked camas bulbs; soft in the middle, golden brown on the outside.
trans-unit.target: Ein Aufstrich aus gleichmäßig gebackenen Prärielilienzwiebeln: weich in der Mitte, goldbraun von außen.

trans-unit.id: Pulverized camas works as an excellent thickener or flavour enhancer.
trans-unit.source: Pulverized camas works as an excellent thickener or flavour enhancer.
trans-unit.target: Pulverisierte Prärielilie lassen sich ausgezeichnet als Verdickungsmittel oder Geschmacksverstärker verwenden.

trans-unit.id: The uneven flame might be mediocre for cooking, but the open flame imparts a great flavor.
trans-unit.source: The uneven flame might be mediocre for cooking, but the open flame imparts a great flavor.
trans-unit.target: Die ungleichmäßige Flamme eignet sich zwar nicht besonders gut zum Kochen, aber die offene Flamme verleiht dem Essen einen tollen Geschmack.

trans-unit.id: A by-product of milling, the germ is the reproductive part of the cereal that germinates.
trans-unit.source: A by-product of milling, the germ is the reproductive part of the cereal that germinates.
trans-unit.target: Ein Nebenprodukt beim Mahlen. Der Keim ist der fruchtbare Teil des Getreides, der austreibt.

trans-unit.id: Perhaps not the best raw vegetable to char, this beet seems to have held up well enough.
trans-unit.source: Perhaps not the best raw vegetable to char, this beet seems to have held up well enough.
trans-unit.target: Vielleicht ist nicht das beste Gemüse, um es zu grillen, aber die Rote Bete scheint sich gut gehalten zu haben.

trans-unit.id: A fibrous and sweet treat much like a sweet potato, though slightly blackened over the heat of a campfire.
trans-unit.source: A fibrous and sweet treat much like a sweet potato, though slightly blackened over the heat of a campfire.
trans-unit.target: Ein faseriger und süßer Leckerbissen, ähnlich wie eine Süßkartoffel, jedoch über der Hitze des Lagerfeuers leicht geschwärzt.

trans-unit.id: At least it doesn't have any scales any more.
trans-unit.source: At least it doesn't have any scales any more.
trans-unit.target: Wenigstens hat er keine Schuppen mehr.

trans-unit.id: A warmly colored kernel studded vegetable.
trans-unit.source: A warmly colored kernel studded vegetable.

trans-unit.id: These deep fried corn treats are both crispy and delicious.
trans-unit.source: These deep fried corn treats are both crispy and delicious.
trans-unit.target: Diese frittierten Maisleckereien sind knusprig und lecker.

trans-unit.id: Dried and ground corn; it's like a courser flour.
trans-unit.source: Dried and ground corn; it's like a courser flour.
trans-unit.target: Getrockneter und gemahlener Mais; Wie ein Schrotmehl.

trans-unit.id: Obtained from the endosperm of the kernal, cornstarch can be used as a thickening agent for sauces.
trans-unit.source: Obtained from the endosperm of the kernal, cornstarch can be used as a thickening agent for sauces.
trans-unit.target: Aus dem Endosperm des Korns gewonnen, kann Maisstärke als Verdickungsmittel für Soßen verwendet werden.

trans-unit.id: Edible mushrooms that are quite tasty.
trans-unit.source: Edible mushrooms that are quite tasty.

trans-unit.id: Just in case you want to eat red things without eating meat.
trans-unit.source: Just in case you want to eat red things without eating meat.
trans-unit.target: Für den Fall, dass du rote Dinge essen möchten, ohne Fleisch zu essen.

trans-unit.id: Give me all the bacon and eggs you have.
trans-unit.source: Give me all the bacon and eggs you have.
trans-unit.target: Gib mir alles an Speck und Eiern, das du hast.

trans-unit.id: A tasty treat made from corn tortillas and meat.
trans-unit.source: A tasty treat made from corn tortillas and meat.
trans-unit.target: Eine Leckerei aus Maistortillas und Fleisch.

trans-unit.id: A prime cut of meat surrounded by pastry.
trans-unit.source: A prime cut of meat surrounded by pastry.

trans-unit.id: A bitter, brightly colored shoot similar to asparagus.
trans-unit.source: A bitter, brightly colored shoot similar to asparagus.
trans-unit.target: Eine bittere, bunte Sprosse; ähnlich wie Spargel.

trans-unit.id: Without any leavening the flatbread isn't very puffy. But it's still tasty.
trans-unit.source: Without any leavening the flatbread isn't very puffy. But it's still tasty.
trans-unit.target: Ohne Gärungsstoff ist das Fladenbrot nicht besonders weich. Aber es ist trotzdem lecker.
Das Geheimnis steckt in der Sauce.

trans-unit.id: While tomatoes are fruits, you don't usually put them in fruit salads.
trans-unit.source: While tomatoes are fruits, you don't usually put them in fruit salads.
trans-unit.target: Obwohl Tomaten Früchte sind, kommen sie in der Regel nicht in Fruchtsalate.

trans-unit.id: A bulbous fruit that used to top Saguaro cacti.
trans-unit.source: A bulbous fruit that used to top Saguaro cacti.
trans-unit.target: Eine Knollenfrucht, die üblicherweise oben auf Saguarokakteen wächst.

trans-unit.id: A concentrated blast of huckleberry goodness.
trans-unit.source: A concentrated blast of huckleberry goodness.
trans-unit.target: Ein konzentrierter Schuss vom Besten der Heidelbeere.

trans-unit.id: A fantastic combination of flaky crust and scrumptious berries.
trans-unit.source: A fantastic combination of flaky crust and scrumptious berries.
trans-unit.target: Eine fantastische Kombination von blättriger Kruste und leckeren Beeren.

trans-unit.id: Oil infused with flavor to enhance it.
trans-unit.source: Oil infused with flavor to enhance it.
trans-unit.target: Öl mit Geschmack, um es zu verbessern.

trans-unit.id: A small circular biscuit with a sweet huckleberry filling.
trans-unit.source: A small circular biscuit with a sweet huckleberry filling.
trans-unit.target: Ein kleiner kreisförmiger Keks mit einer süßen Heidelbeerfüllung.

trans-unit.id: Much like a huckleberry pie, but filled to the brim with succulent meat.
trans-unit.source: Much like a huckleberry pie, but filled to the brim with succulent meat.
trans-unit.target: Ähnlich wie eine Heidelbeertorte, aber gefüllt mit saftigem Fleisch.

trans-unit.id: A meaty stock made from the flesh of animals.

trans-unit.id: Milk, although maybe not from an animal.
trans-unit.source: Milk, although maybe not from an animal.
trans-unit.target: Milch, aber vielleicht nicht von einem Tier.

trans-unit.id: A plant fat extracted for use in cooking.
trans-unit.source: A plant fat extracted for use in cooking.

trans-unit.source: Carefully butchered meat, ready to cook.

trans-unit.source: A succulent fruit coated in a rather terrifying array of spines.
trans-unit.target: Eine saftige Frucht, umhüllt von eher furchterregenden Stacheln.

trans-unit.id: A perfectly marbled piece of meat.
trans-unit.source: A perfectly marbled piece of meat.

trans-unit.id: A fatty cut of meat that happens to be inexplicably tastier than other cuts.
trans-unit.source: A fatty cut of meat that happens to be inexplicably tastier than other cuts.
trans-unit.target: Ein fettiges Stück Fleisch,das überraschenderweise leckerer ist als andere Stücke.

trans-unit.id: A fatty cut of raw fish.
trans-unit.source: A fatty cut of raw fish.

trans-unit.id: Fresh raw meat from the hunt. It should probably be cooked before being consumed.
trans-unit.source: Fresh raw meat from the hunt. It should probably be cooked before being consumed.
trans-unit.target: Frisches, rohes Fleisch von der Jagd. Es sollte vor dem Essen gekocht werden.

trans-unit.id: A trussed roast tied and ready to be cooked.
trans-unit.source: A trussed roast tied and ready to be cooked.

trans-unit.id: Ground meat stuffed into an intestine casing.
trans-unit.source: Ground meat stuffed into an intestine casing.

trans-unit.id: A cut of perfectly seared steak.
trans-unit.source: A cut of perfectly seared steak.

trans-unit.id: Meat cooked in meat juices keeps the meat juicy.
trans-unit.source: Meat cooked in meat juices keeps the meat juicy.

trans-unit.id: Even sweet lovers don't eat sugar plain.
trans-unit.source: Even sweet lovers don't eat sugar plain.
trans-unit.target: Auch Süßigkeitenliebhaber ernähren sich nicht nur von Zucker.

trans-unit.id: The sweetness of the fruits happens to work well with the salad.
trans-unit.source: The sweetness of the fruits happens to work well with the salad.
trans-unit.target: Die natürliche Süße der Früchte harmoniert gut mit dem Salat.

trans-unit.id: Rendered animal fat useful for more than just cooking.
trans-unit.source: Rendered animal fat useful for more than just cooking.
trans-unit.target: Tierische Fette sind nicht nur zum Kochen nützlich.

trans-unit.id: Intelligence is knowing this is a fruit; wisdom is not putting it in a fruit salad.
trans-unit.source: Intelligence is knowing this is a fruit; wisdom is not putting it in a fruit salad.
trans-unit.target: Intelligenz ist, zu wissen, dass es sich hierbei um eine Frucht handelt; Weisheit ist, diese nicht in einem Obstsalat zu verwenden.

trans-unit.id: Any enzyme that can be used to bond proteins together.
trans-unit.source: Any enzyme that can be used to bond proteins together.
trans-unit.target: Jedes Enzym, das dazu genutzt werden kann, Proteine zu binden.

trans-unit.id: Who knew plants in plant broth could be so tasty?
trans-unit.source: Who knew plants in plant broth could be so tasty?

trans-unit.id: A hearty stock full of assorted vegetables.
trans-unit.source: A hearty stock full of assorted vegetables.

trans-unit.id: A common grain that is significantly more useful processed.

trans-unit.id: A thick stew made with a variety of vegetables.

trans-unit.id: While a bunch of wilted fiddleheads may seem a bit sad, at least they're nutritious.

trans-unit.target: Auch wenn ein paar welke Farnspitzen traurig aussehen mögen, sind sie zumindest nahrhaft.

trans-unit.id: A fungus that acts as an amazing leavening agent.

trans-unit.id: A more advanced version of the normal combustion engine that produces a greater output.

trans-unit.id: Use with the bow to hunt for food (or amaze your friends by shooting apples off of their heads).
trans-unit.source: Use with the bow to hunt for food (or amaze your friends by shooting apples off of their heads).

trans-unit.id: A towering metal light post that requires electricity to run.

trans-unit.target: Eine hoch aufragende Laterne aus Metall, die Elektrizität benötigt.

trans-unit.id: A candle which can burn tallow to produce a small amount of light.
trans-unit.source: A candle which can burn tallow to produce a small amount of light.
trans-unit.target: Eine Kerze, die Talg verbrennen kann, um etwas Licht zu spenden.

trans-unit.id: A pottery lamp. Fuel with tallow.
trans-unit.source: A pottery lamp. Fuel with tallow.

trans-unit.id: A candle mounted on a wall bracket which can burn tallow to produce a small amount of light.
trans-unit.source: A candle mounted on a wall bracket which can burn tallow to produce a small amount of light.
trans-unit.target: Eine Wandkerze, die Talg verbrennen kann, um etwas Licht zu spenden.

trans-unit.id: A set of smoothing and woodworking tools that assist in creating wheels and transportation.
trans-unit.source: A set of smoothing and woodworking tools that assist in creating wheels and transportation.
trans-unit.target: Eine Reihe von Glättungs- und Holzverarbeitungswerkzeugen, die bei der Schaffung von Rädern und Transport benötigt werden.

trans-unit.id: Sometimes it can be nice to have clean clothes.
trans-unit.source: Sometimes it can be nice to have clean clothes.
trans-unit.target: Manchmal ist es schön, saubere Kleidung zu haben.

trans-unit.id: Why hand scrub your clothes on a washboard when you could throw them into this magical cleaning machine?
trans-unit.source: Why hand scrub your clothes on a washboard when you could throw them into this magical cleaning machine?
trans-unit.target: Wieso Kleidung von Hand waschen, wenn man sie einfach in diese magisch-reinigende Maschine werfen kann?

trans-unit.id: A much more comfortable bed made with fabric.
trans-unit.source: A much more comfortable bed made with fabric.
trans-unit.target: Ein viel gemütlicheres Bett, das mit Stoff gebaut ist.

trans-unit.id: A nice, scratchy and horrible uncomfortable bed. But at least it keeps you off the ground.
trans-unit.source: A nice, scratchy and horrible uncomfortable bed. But at least it keeps you off the ground.
trans-unit.target: Ein schönes, kratziges und schrecklich ungemütliches Bett. Aber zumindest muss man nicht auf dem Boden schlafen.

trans-unit.id: A large sign for all your large text needs!
trans-unit.source: A large sign for all your large text needs!
trans-unit.target: Ein großes Schild für deine großen Texte!

trans-unit.id: A bench for the basics and making even more benches.
trans-unit.source: A bench for the basics and making even more benches.
trans-unit.target: Eine Bank für die Grundlagen und um noch mehr Bänke zu machen.

trans-unit.id: Error or otherwise informative message goes here.
trans-unit.source: Error or otherwise informative message goes here.
trans-unit.target: Fehler und andersweitig informative Nachrichten hier hin.

trans-unit.id: {0:name} has logged in to this world for the first time!
trans-unit.source: {0:name} has logged in to this world for the first time!
trans-unit.target: {0:name} hat sich auf dieser Welt zum ersten Mal angemeldet!

trans-unit.id: [Select on toolbar and right-click to place.]
trans-unit.source: [Select on toolbar and right-click to place.]
trans-unit.target: [Wähle in der Inventarleiste und platziere mit Rechtsklick.]

trans-unit.id: That item is not the right type of clothing
trans-unit.source: That item is not the right type of clothing
trans-unit.target: Dieser Gegenstand ist nicht die richtige Art von Kleidung

trans-unit.id: Can't modify an item stack quantity to below zero
trans-unit.source: Can't modify an item stack quantity to below zero
trans-unit.target: Die Anzahl eines Stapels kann nicht auf unter Null geändert werden

trans-unit.id: A {0:room module} is needed to craft {1:item}
trans-unit.source: A {0:room module} is needed to craft {1:item}
trans-unit.target: Ein {0:room module} wird benötigt, um {1:item} herzustellen

trans-unit.id: {0:skill scroll} created. Read to gain skill or share with other players.
trans-unit.source: {0:skill scroll} created. Read to gain skill or share with other players.
trans-unit.target: {0:skill scroll} erstellt. Lese sie, um die Fertigkeit zu erhalten oder teile sie mit anderen Spielern.

trans-unit.id: A bread with a camas twist for a bit of flavor and fun.
trans-unit.source: A bread with a camas twist for a bit of flavor and fun.
trans-unit.target: Ein Brot mit Prärielilien als kleine Überraschung, für ein bisschen Geschmack und Spaß.

trans-unit.id: Displays government activity, such as laws and elections, and provides links to the server's web page.
trans-unit.source: Displays government activity, such as laws and elections, and provides links to the server's web page.
trans-unit.target: Zeigt Regierungsaktivitäten wie Gesetze und Wahlen an und stellt Links zur Webseite des Servers bereit.

trans-unit.id: Opens the objectives panel, showing the stated objectives and other activities of citizens.
trans-unit.source: Opens the objectives panel, showing the stated objectives and other activities of citizens.
trans-unit.target: Öffnet das Zielpanel mit den erklärten Zielen und anderen Aktivitäten der Bürger.

trans-unit.id: A multiplier applied to the cost of learning a specialty.
trans-unit.source: A multiplier applied to the cost of learning a specialty.
trans-unit.target: Kostenmultiplikator für das Lernen von Berufen.

trans-unit.id: Whether or not a meteor exists in the world.
trans-unit.source: Whether or not a meteor exists in the world.
trans-unit.target: Ob ein Meteor in der Welt existieren soll oder nicht.

trans-unit.id: Time in days when the meteor will impact.
trans-unit.source: Time in days when the meteor will impact.
trans-unit.target: Zeit in Tagen, bis der Meteor einschlägt.

trans-unit.id: Whether to use a whitelist to choose which mods to load. If disabled, all mods will be loaded.
trans-unit.source: Whether to use a whitelist to choose which mods to load. If disabled, all mods will be loaded.
trans-unit.target: Ob eine Whitelist verwendet werden soll, um auszuwählen, welche Mods geladen werden sollen. Falls deaktiviert, werden alle Mods geladen.

trans-unit.id: If the WhitelistEnabled setting is turned on, the whitelist of mods to load, by .dll file name
trans-unit.source: If the WhitelistEnabled setting is turned on, the whitelist of mods to load, by .dll file name
trans-unit.target: Wenn die Whitelist in den Einstellungen aktiv ist, lädt sie nur die Mods, der in der Whitelist aufgeführten .dll-Dateien

trans-unit.id: Check for unity file updates regularly. (Useful if you are actively building mod bundles and don't want to restart the server to test changes.)
trans-unit.source: Check for unity file updates regularly. (Useful if you are actively building mod bundles and don't want to restart the server to test changes.)
trans-unit.target: Überprüfe regelmäßig auf Dateiupdates von Unity. (Nützlich, wenn du aktiv Modpacks zusammenstellst und nicht den Server neustarten willst, um Änderungen zu testen.)

trans-unit.id: Whether or not to post this server to Strange Loop Games public server listings.
trans-unit.source: Whether or not to post this server to Strange Loop Games public server listings.
trans-unit.target: Ob dieser Server in der öffentlichen Strange-Loop-Games-Serverliste angezeigt werden soll.

trans-unit.id: If not empty, require this password to connect to the server, unless the connecting user is on the whitelist.
trans-unit.source: If not empty, require this password to connect to the server, unless the connecting user is on the whitelist.
trans-unit.target: Wenn vorhanden, wird dieses Passwort benötigt, um sich mit dem Server zu verbinden, außer der Benutzer steht auf der Whitelist.

trans-unit.id: Rate at which the server sends updates to clients, per second. (1 - 60)
trans-unit.source: Rate at which the server sends updates to clients, per second. (1 - 60)
trans-unit.target: Geschwindigkeit, in der der Server Updates zu dem Client schickt in Sekunden. (1-60)

trans-unit.id: If set, rooms can have empty blocks serve as windows and still count as a room.
trans-unit.source: If set, rooms can have empty blocks serve as windows and still count as a room.
trans-unit.target: Falls Ausgewählt, zählen leere Blöcke in Räumen als Fenster.

trans-unit.id: Game progress time advances at this rate.
trans-unit.source: Game progress time advances at this rate.
trans-unit.target: Spielfortschritts-Zeit wird um diesen Wert erhöht.

trans-unit.id: Scales skill penalty due to suffocation. (0 to disable)
trans-unit.source: Scales skill penalty due to suffocation. (0 to disable)
trans-unit.target: Anpassung der Fertigkeitspunktbestrafung wegen Erstickungsgefahr. (0 zum Deaktiveren)

trans-unit.id: Number of layer images/day to store in save file. (Default: 4)
trans-unit.source: Number of layer images/day to store in save file. (Default: 4)
trans-unit.target: Anzahl der Ebenenbilder / Tag zum Speichern in der Sicherungsdatei. (Standard: 4)

trans-unit.id: Scales how time of day matches real time. Higher numbers result in shorter day/night cycles, but will not affect simulation speed.
trans-unit.source: Scales how time of day matches real time. Higher numbers result in shorter day/night cycles, but will not affect simulation speed.
trans-unit.target: Regelt, wie die Zeit des Tages mit der reellen Zeit übereinstimmt. Eine höhere Zahl verursacht einen kürzeren Tag/Nacht Zyklus, beeinflusst aber nicht die Simulationsgeschwindigkeit.

trans-unit.id: How often to write changed data to disk, in seconds.
trans-unit.source: How often to write changed data to disk, in seconds.
trans-unit.target: Wie häufig Daten gespeichert werden sollen. In Sekunden.

trans-unit.id: If true, removes failed to load objects upon loading.
trans-unit.source: If true, removes failed to load objects upon loading.
trans-unit.target: Wenn "true", werden Objekte entfernt, die nicht geladen werden konnten.

trans-unit.id: Whether or not to validate users with the accounts server.
trans-unit.source: Whether or not to validate users with the accounts server.
trans-unit.target: Ob die Benutzer durch den Kontoserver validiert werden sollen.

trans-unit.id: Allows debug calls to be made to the webserver, like 'GenerateTestData'.
trans-unit.source: Allows debug calls to be made to the webserver, like 'GenerateTestData'.
trans-unit.target: Ermöglicht Debugaufrufe an den Webserver wie "GenerateTestData".

trans-unit.id: Users on the whitelist do not need to enter a password to connect to a passworded server. Use either SLG ID or STEAMID64
trans-unit.source: Users on the whitelist do not need to enter a password to connect to a passworded server. Use either SLG ID or STEAMID64
trans-unit.target: Benutzer auf der Whitelist müssen kein Passwort eingeben, um einem passwortgeschützten Server beizutreten. SLG-ID oder STEAM-ID-64 können verwendet werden

trans-unit.id: Blacklisted users are denied connection to the server. Use either SLG ID or STEAMID64
trans-unit.source: Blacklisted users are denied connection to the server. Use either SLG ID or STEAMID64
trans-unit.target: Spieler auf der Blacklist können dem Server nicht beitreten. SLG-ID oder STEAM-ID-64 können verwendet werden

trans-unit.id: Admins are allowed to use the chat commands. (/ban, /give, etc.) Use either SLG ID or STEAMID64
trans-unit.source: Admins are allowed to use the chat commands. (/ban, /give, etc.) Use either SLG ID or STEAMID64
trans-unit.target: Admins ist es erlaubt, die Chatbefehle zu verwenden. (/ban, /give, usw.) Benutze SLG-ID oder STEAMID64

trans-unit.id: The titles players are given for each reputation level.
trans-unit.source: The titles players are given for each reputation level.
trans-unit.target: Titel, die Spielern je nach Ansehen gegeben werden.

trans-unit.id: Time between World Object Ticks in milliseconds. (0 for variable)
trans-unit.source: Time between World Object Ticks in milliseconds. (0 for variable)
trans-unit.target: Die Zeit zwischen Weltobjektticks in Millisekunden. (0 für variable)

trans-unit.id: Chunk dimensions of the world along X-Z.
trans-unit.source: Chunk dimensions of the world along X-Z.
trans-unit.target: Chunkdimensionen der Welt entlang der X-Z Achse.

trans-unit.id: Maximum height of the world when generating terrain.
trans-unit.source: Maximum height of the world when generating terrain.
trans-unit.target: Die maximale Höhe der Welt, wenn diese generiert wird.

trans-unit.id: Defines the world module for world generation.
trans-unit.source: Defines the world module for world generation.
trans-unit.target: Beschreibt das Weltmodul für die Weltgenerierung.

trans-unit.id: Default atmosphere object type for the world.
trans-unit.source: Default atmosphere object type for the world.
trans-unit.target: Standard Objekttyp der Atmosphäre für die Welt.

trans-unit.id: Max % of one CPU to use for ticking world chunks. (25% - 100%)
trans-unit.source: Max % of one CPU to use for ticking world chunks. (25% - 100%)
trans-unit.target: Maximale % der CPU, um die Weltchunks zu ticken. (25% - 100 %)

trans-unit.id: Decorative plants are not simulated after being spawned
trans-unit.source: Decorative plants are not simulated after being spawned
trans-unit.target: Dekorative Pflanzen sind nicht simuliert nach dem Spawnen

trans-unit.id: After harvesting, we reset their growth percent to this value, 0 -1. 0 means kill the plant.
trans-unit.source: After harvesting, we reset their growth percent to this value, 0 -1. 0 means kill the plant.
trans-unit.target: Nach dem Ernten, resetten wir die Wachstumsprozent auf einen Wert zwischen 0 und 1. 0 lässt die Pflanze vertrocknen.

trans-unit.id: If this gets scythed, does it die?
trans-unit.source: If this gets scythed, does it die?
trans-unit.target: Wenn das gesenst wird, stirbt es dann?

trans-unit.id: If I can pick this, at what percent is that possible?
trans-unit.source: If I can pick this, at what percent is that possible?
trans-unit.target: Wenn ich das wählen kann, zu welchem Prozentsatz ist das möglich?

trans-unit.id: The exponential rate parameter describing the birth rate of the species in ideal growth conditions and no competition. The % of the population in the area that will reproduce in one tick.
trans-unit.source: The exponential rate parameter describing the birth rate of the species in ideal growth conditions and no competition. The % of the population in the area that will reproduce in one tick.
trans-unit.target: Der Exponentialratenparameter beschreibt die Vermehrungsrate der Spezies unter idealen Wachstumsbedingungen und ohne Konkurrenz. Der Prozentsatz der Population in der Region, der pro Tick stirbt, sollte immer geringer als der der Reproduktion sein.

trans-unit.id: The exponential rate parameter describing the death rate of the species in ideal growth conditions and no competition. The % of the population in the area that will die in one tick. Should always be LESS than MaxGrowthRate.
trans-unit.source: The exponential rate parameter describing the death rate of the species in ideal growth conditions and no competition. The % of the population in the area that will die in one tick. Should always be LESS than MaxGrowthRate.
trans-unit.target: Der Exponentialratenparameter beschreibt die Sterblichkeitsrate der Spezies unter idealen Wachstumsbedingungen und ohne Konkurrenz. Der Prozentsatz der Population in der Region, der pro Tick stirbt. Sollte immer weniger als der der Reproduktion sein.

trans-unit.id: The exponential rate parameter describing the rate at which the plant spreads to adjacent locations.
trans-unit.source: The exponential rate parameter describing the rate at which the plant spreads to adjacent locations.
trans-unit.target: Der Exponentialratenparameter beschreibt die Geschwindigkeit, mit der sich die Pflanze in der Umgebung ausbreitet.

trans-unit.id: The plant's preferred temperature range. Temperatures in this range won't inhibit population growth or reduce yield.
trans-unit.source: The plant's preferred temperature range. Temperatures in this range won't inhibit population growth or reduce yield.
trans-unit.target: Bevorzugte Temperaturspanne. Temperaturen in diesem Bereich werden die Fortpflanzung oder den Ertrag nicht hemmen oder verringern.

trans-unit.id: The plant's preferred moisture range. Moisture in this range won't inhibit population growth or reduce yield.
trans-unit.source: The plant's preferred moisture range. Moisture in this range won't inhibit population growth or reduce yield.
trans-unit.target: Bevorzugte Feuchtigkeit. Feuchtigkeit in diesem Bereich wird die Fortpflanzung oder den Ertrag nicht hemmen oder verringern.

trans-unit.id: The temperature range that can support this plant (albeit at reduced efficiency if the temperature is not also within the ideal range). Temperatures outside this range prohibit reproduction entirely and prevent any yield at all.
trans-unit.source: The temperature range that can support this plant (albeit at reduced efficiency if the temperature is not also within the ideal range). Temperatures outside this range prohibit reproduction entirely and prevent any yield at all.
trans-unit.target: Die Temperaturspanne, die für diese Pflanze geeignet ist (wenn auch mit reduzierter Effizienz, falls die Temperatur nicht im idealen Bereich liegt). Temperaturen außerhalb dieses Bereichs, verhindern die Reproduktion gänzlich und außerdem jeglichen Ertrag.

trans-unit.id: The maximum ground pollution density that the plant can tolerate. Above this value, the plant cannot reproduce, and will have zero yield.
trans-unit.source: The maximum ground pollution density that the plant can tolerate. Above this value, the plant cannot reproduce, and will have zero yield.
trans-unit.target: Die maximale Bodenverschmutzungsdichte, die die Pflanze vertragen kann. Oberhalb dieses Wertes kann sich die Pflanze nicht vermehren und hat keine Ertrag.

trans-unit.id: The voxelsPerEntry that this species should be tracked at.
trans-unit.source: The voxelsPerEntry that this species should be tracked at.
trans-unit.target: Die "voxelsPerEntry", die für diese Spezies berücksichtigt werden sollen.

trans-unit.id: The string which is used as an identifier for this species. Cannot be edited freely, as it is referenced by other config.
trans-unit.source: The string which is used as an identifier for this species. Cannot be edited freely, as it is referenced by other config.
trans-unit.target: Die Zeichenfolge, die als Bezeichnung für diese Spezies verwendet wird. Kann nicht frei bearbeitet werden, da andere Konfigurationen auf diese verweisen.

trans-unit.id: The displayed name of this species. Can be edited freely.
trans-unit.source: The displayed name of this species. Can be edited freely.
trans-unit.target: Der angezeigte Name dieser Spezies. Kann frei bearbeitet werden.

trans-unit.id: Maturity age in days. Organisms older than this value are considered fully grown and can reproduce.
trans-unit.source: Maturity age in days. Organisms older than this value are considered fully grown and can reproduce.
trans-unit.target: Wachstumsfortschritt in Tagen. Organismen, die älter als dieser Wert sind, gelten als ausgewachsen und können sich vermehren.

trans-unit.id: List of ranges where the corresponding branches begin to grow, as well as the rate of their growth
trans-unit.source: List of ranges where the corresponding branches begin to grow, as well as the rate of their growth
trans-unit.target: Liste der Bereiche, wo die entsprechenden Zweige beginnen zu wachsen, sowie auch ihre Wachstumsrate

trans-unit.id: If true, spawned trees will be rotated at a random angle.
trans-unit.source: If true, spawned trees will be rotated at a random angle.
trans-unit.target: Wenn "true", werden gespawnte Bäume in einem zufälligen Winkel gedreht.

trans-unit.id: The number of branches this tree will have.
trans-unit.source: The number of branches this tree will have.
trans-unit.target: Die Anzahl der Zweige, die dieser Baum haben wird.

trans-unit.id: Controllers: {0:n0} Changes/s: {1:n1} Average update: {2:n1}ms Last clean: {3:n1}ms
trans-unit.source: Controllers: {0:n0} Changes/s: {1:n1} Average update: {2:n1}ms Last clean: {3:n1}ms
trans-unit.target: Controller: {0:n0} Änderungen/s: {1:n1} Durchschnittliches Update: {2:n1}ms Letzte Säuberung: {3:n1}ms

trans-unit.id: Danger lurks in the skies above...
trans-unit.source: Danger lurks in the skies above...

trans-unit.note: Total number of chunks in the world
Total number of active chunks in the world
Total number of frozen chunks in the world
Total number of packed chunks in the world
Total number of chunks packs that are marked dirty in the world

trans-unit.id: Average tick: {0:n1}ms Last tick: {1:n1}ms Combined Times: {2:n1}
trans-unit.source: Average tick: {0:n1}ms Last tick: {1:n1}ms Combined Times: {2:n1}
trans-unit.target: Durchschnittlicher Tick: {0:n1}ms, letzter Tick: {1:n1}ms, Zeiten kombiniert: {2:n1}

trans-unit.id: The currently selected language. If you change languages, you'll need to restart the server for changes to fully take effect.
trans-unit.source: The currently selected language. If you change languages, you'll need to restart the server for changes to fully take effect.
trans-unit.target: Die aktuelle gewählte Sprache. Um die Sprache zu ändern, muss der Server neu gestartet werden.

trans-unit.id: The world is safe for now, at least from the meteor.
trans-unit.source: The world is safe for now, at least from the meteor.
trans-unit.target: Die Welt ist einstweilig sicher, zumindest vor dem Meteor.

trans-unit.id: Contract time has expired! Client can mark 'Job Failed' at anytime
trans-unit.source: Contract time has expired! Client can mark 'Job Failed' at anytime
trans-unit.target: Die Auftragslaufzeit ist abgelaufen! Der Kunde kann jederzeit "Auftrag fehlgeschlagen" markieren

trans-unit.id: Width must be greater than zero.
trans-unit.source: Width must be greater than zero.
trans-unit.target: Breite muss größer als null sein.

trans-unit.id: {0} is too low: {1} but must be {2}.
trans-unit.source: {0} is too low: {1} but must be {2}.
trans-unit.target: {0} ist zu niedrig: {1}, muss aber {2} sein.

trans-unit.id: After a room's value passes its soft-cap, additional value will diminish exponentially.
trans-unit.source: After a room's value passes its soft-cap, additional value will diminish exponentially.
trans-unit.target: Nachdem ein Raum sein Soft-Cap überschritten hat, wird jeder zusätzliche Wert exponentiell abnehmen.

trans-unit.id: Room value was soft-capped from {0} to {1} due to materials ({2} reduction)
trans-unit.source: Room value was soft-capped from {0} to {1} due to materials ({2} reduction)
trans-unit.target: Raumwert wurde wegen der Materialien ({2} -Reduktion) von {0} auf {1} gesenkt

trans-unit.id: Includes natural blocks (caves, mud huts, etc).
trans-unit.source: Includes natural blocks (caves, mud huts, etc).

trans-unit.target: Ein Speicherstand namens '{0}' ist bereits vorhanden
trans-unit.note: {0} - save name e.g. A save named 'nice new world' already exists

trans-unit.id: Not enough items carried to place.
trans-unit.source: Not enough items carried to place.
trans-unit.target: Nicht genug Gegenstände zum Ort getragen.

trans-unit.id: Click a stockpile or vehicle to pick up materials.
trans-unit.source: Click a stockpile or vehicle to pick up materials.
trans-unit.target: Klicke auf ein Lager oder Fahrzeug, um Materialien aufzunehmen.

trans-unit.id: Click to begin building a wall.
trans-unit.source: Click to begin building a wall.
trans-unit.target: Klicke, um anzufangen eine Wand zu bauen.

trans-unit.id: Click to build a {0} x {1} x {2} wall ({3} blocks).
trans-unit.source: Click to build a {0} x {1} x {2} wall ({3} blocks).
trans-unit.target: Klicke, um eine {0} x {1} x {2} Wand zu bauen ({3} Blöcke).

trans-unit.id: Can't start single player.\nHosting a single player Eco server requires a 64-bit system, and you are currently running 32-bits.
trans-unit.source: Can't start single player.\nHosting a single player Eco server requires a 64-bit system, and you are currently running 32-bits.
trans-unit.target: Einzelspieler kann nicht gestartet werden.\nDas Hosten eines Einzelspieler Ecoservers benötigt ein 64-Bit-System und derzeit werden 32-Bit ausgeführt.

trans-unit.id: How much of this debt do you want to forgive? Up to {0}.
trans-unit.source: How much of this debt do you want to forgive? Up to {0}.
trans-unit.target: Wie viel von dieser Schuld möchtest du vergeben? Bis zu {0}.

trans-unit.id: Please enter a name for the service.
trans-unit.source: Please enter a name for the service.
trans-unit.target: Bitte geben Sie einen Namen für den Dienst ein.

trans-unit.id: Please enter a URI for the service.
trans-unit.source: Please enter a URI for the service.
trans-unit.target: Bitte geben Sie eine URL für den Dienst ein.

trans-unit.id: The URI you entered is not a valid URI.
trans-unit.source: The URI you entered is not a valid URI.
trans-unit.target: Die URI, die du eingegeben hast, ist keine gültige URI.

trans-unit.id: Learn to play in a new world with other beginners.
trans-unit.source: Learn to play in a new world with other beginners.
trans-unit.target: Lerne in einer Welt mit anderen Einsteigern zu spielen.

trans-unit.id: Worlds with established cities welcoming new citizens.
trans-unit.source: Worlds with established cities welcoming new citizens.
trans-unit.target: Welten mit etablierten Städten, die neue Bürger wilkommen heißen.
Erfahrene Bürger in Welten mit großer Zusammenarbeit.
Modifizierte Welten zum Entdecken einzigartiger Erfahrungen.

trans-unit.id: This is a test server containing the next release of the game, which will be kept stable (so you can play normally here long-term).\n\nTo play here, you will need to switch to the staging build.
trans-unit.source: This is a test server containing the next release of the game, which will be kept stable (so you can play normally here long-term).\n\nTo play here, you will need to switch to the staging build.
trans-unit.target: Dies ist ein Testserver mit der nächsten Version des Spiels, der stabil gehalten wird (so dass du hier lange spielen kannst).\n\nUm hier spielen zu können, musst du zum Staging Build wechseln.

trans-unit.id: In Steam, right click Eco and select 'Properties'. On the Beta tab, opt-in and select the build called 'Staging'.
trans-unit.source: In Steam, right click Eco and select 'Properties'. On the Beta tab, opt-in and select the build called 'Staging'.
trans-unit.target: In Steam, klicke rechts auf Eco und wähle "Eigenschaften". Aktiviere das Kästchen auf der Registerkarte "Beta" und wähle "Staging".

trans-unit.id: This server is running a different version. You are running {0} but the server is running {1}.
trans-unit.source: This server is running a different version. You are running {0} but the server is running {1}.
trans-unit.target: Dieser Server läuft auf einer anderen Version. Du verwendest {0}, aber der Server verwendet {1}.

trans-unit.id: This is a test server containing the next release of the game, which will be kept stable (so you can play normally here long-term).
trans-unit.source: This is a test server containing the next release of the game, which will be kept stable (so you can play normally here long-term).
trans-unit.target: Dies ist ein Testserver mit der nächsten Version des Spiels, der stabil gehalten wird (so dass du hier lange spielen kannst).

trans-unit.id: To switch to the staging build, in Steam, right click Eco and select 'Properties'. On the Beta tab, opt-in and select the build called 'Staging'.
trans-unit.source: To switch to the staging build, in Steam, right click Eco and select 'Properties'. On the Beta tab, opt-in and select the build called 'Staging'.
trans-unit.target: Um zur Beta zur gelangen, klick un Steam mit der rechten Maustaste auf Eco und wähle "Eigenschaften". Gehe zum Register "Betas" und wähle "Staging" aus.

trans-unit.source: Whether or not to keep backups.

trans-unit.source: Makeup of the atmosphere in percentages.

trans-unit.source: Show atmosphere data in status panel.

trans-unit.id: The starting level of CO2 in the atmosphere, and the min value we clamp to.
trans-unit.source: The starting level of CO2 in the atmosphere, and the min value we clamp to.
trans-unit.target: Der Ausgangswert von CO2 in der Atmosphäre, und der minimum Wert an den wir klemmen.

trans-unit.id: Whether sea level changes should be simulated.
trans-unit.source: Whether sea level changes should be simulated.
trans-unit.target: Ob Veränderungen des Meeresspiegels simuliert werden sollen.

trans-unit.id: Whether temperature changes should be simulated.
trans-unit.source: Whether temperature changes should be simulated.
trans-unit.target: Ob Veränderungen der Temperatur simuliert werden sollen.

trans-unit.id: Sea levels start rising when CO2 is above this value
trans-unit.source: Sea levels start rising when CO2 is above this value
trans-unit.target: Der Meeresspiegel steigt, wenn die Menge an CO2 über diesen Wert steigt

trans-unit.id: For every X ppm over the base 'SeaLevelsRiseAtCO2ppm' value, the sea level will rise 1 meter.
trans-unit.source: For every X ppm over the base 'SeaLevelsRiseAtCO2ppm' value, the sea level will rise 1 meter.
trans-unit.target: Für jedes X ppm über dem Basiswert "SeaLevelsRiseAtCO2ppm" wird der Meeresspiegel um 1m steigen.

trans-unit.id: No matter how bad it gets, it will never get worse than this.
trans-unit.source: No matter how bad it gets, it will never get worse than this.
trans-unit.target: Egal wie schlimm es wird, es wird niemals schlimmer als das.

trans-unit.id: Sea levels can not rise more than this many units per day.
trans-unit.source: Sea levels can not rise more than this many units per day.
trans-unit.target: Der Meeresspiegel kann nicht mehr als diese Anzahl an Einheiten pro Tag ansteigen.

trans-unit.id: Temperature can not rise more than this many units per day.
trans-unit.source: Temperature can not rise more than this many units per day.
trans-unit.target: Die Temperatur kann nicht mehr als diese Anzahl an Einheiten pro Tag steigen.

trans-unit.id: At this level of CO2, global temperatures start to rise.
trans-unit.source: At this level of CO2, global temperatures start to rise.
trans-unit.target: Ab diesem CO2 Wert fängt die globale Temperatur an zu steigen.

trans-unit.id: For every X ppm over the base 'SeaLevelsRiseAtCO2ppm' value, the global temperature level will rise 1 degree.
trans-unit.source: For every X ppm over the base 'SeaLevelsRiseAtCO2ppm' value, the global temperature level will rise 1 degree.
trans-unit.target: Für jedes X ppm über dem Basiswert 'SeaLevelsRiseAtCO2ppm' wird die globale Temperatur um ein Grad steigen.

trans-unit.id: The amount of ground pollution emitted by each incorrectly stored tailing block each tick.
trans-unit.source: The amount of ground pollution emitted by each incorrectly stored tailing block each tick.
trans-unit.target: Die Menge Bodenverschmutzung, die von jedem falsch gelagerten Schlackeblock pro Tick ausgestoßen wird.

trans-unit.id: Debris max value is attained when this many blocks are placed.
trans-unit.source: Debris max value is attained when this many blocks are placed.
trans-unit.target: Der maximale Trümmerwert wird erreicht, wenn diese Anzahl an Blöcken platziert wird.

trans-unit.id: How quickly an animal will flee from a predator/player once noticed.
trans-unit.source: How quickly an animal will flee from a predator/player once noticed.
trans-unit.target: Wie schnell ein Tier vor einem Raubtier/Spieler fliehen wird.

trans-unit.source: The number of calories in a single voxel column of this plant at population density 1.
trans-unit.target: Die Anzahl der Kalorien in einer einzigen Voxelspalte von dieser Pflanze bei einer Populationsdichte von 1.

trans-unit.id: The world layer describing the concentration of the nutrient.
trans-unit.source: The world layer describing the concentration of the nutrient.
trans-unit.target: Die Weltebene zur Anzeige von Nährstoffkonzentrationen.

trans-unit.id: The concentration of the nutrient at which the plant grows at half its max rate. 0 = plant is not constrained.
trans-unit.source: The concentration of the nutrient at which the plant grows at half its max rate. 0 = plant is not constrained.
trans-unit.target: Die Nährstoffkonzentration mit der die Pflanze mit der Hälfte der maximal möglichen Geschwindigkeit wächst. 0 = Die Pflanze ist uneingeschränkt.

trans-unit.source: The concentration of the nutrient (amount / voxel column) in an adult plant.
trans-unit.target: Die Konzentration eines Nährstoffes (Menge / Voxelspalte) in einer ausgewachsenen Pflanze.

trans-unit.source: The world layer describing the local capacity.
trans-unit.target: Die Weltebene, die die lokale Kapazität beschreibt.

trans-unit.id: The density of capacity consumed by this organism, in voxel columns occupied per organism.
trans-unit.source: The density of capacity consumed by this organism, in voxel columns occupied per organism.

trans-unit.id: The input layers. Cycles are allowed.
trans-unit.source: The input layers. Cycles are allowed.

trans-unit.id: The layer to modify with this interaction.
trans-unit.source: The layer to modify with this interaction.

trans-unit.id: The top block of the biome.
trans-unit.source: The top block of the biome.

trans-unit.id: A list of food sources which this animal relies on.
trans-unit.source: A list of food sources which this animal relies on.

trans-unit.id: Available calories of food sources in the area to support one animal fully.
trans-unit.source: Available calories of food sources in the area to support one animal fully.
trans-unit.target: Vorhandene Kalorien von Nahrungsquellen in dem Gebiet um ein Tier komplett zu versorgen.

trans-unit.id: The name of the layer that contains the concentration of the first input.
trans-unit.source: The name of the layer that contains the concentration of the first input.
trans-unit.target: Der Name der Ebene, die die Konzentration der ersten Eingabe enthält.

trans-unit.id: The name of the layer that contains the concentration of the second input.
trans-unit.source: The name of the layer that contains the concentration of the second input.
trans-unit.target: Der Name der Ebene, die die Konzentration der zweiten Eingabe enthält.

trans-unit.id: The name of the layer that contains the concentration of the product.
trans-unit.source: The name of the layer that contains the concentration of the product.
trans-unit.target: Der Name der Ebene, die die Konzentration des Produkts enthält.

trans-unit.id: The amount of product to create (or, if negative, to remove) when the product of the input concentrations is 1.
trans-unit.source: The amount of product to create (or, if negative, to remove) when the product of the input concentrations is 1.
trans-unit.target: Die Menge an Produkten, die erzeugt werden soll (oder, falls negativ, entfernt werden soll), wenn das Produkt der Eingangskonzentrationen 1 ist.

trans-unit.id: Whether the interaction should operate on the special first initialization tick after worldgen (when dependency cycles are not allowed).
trans-unit.source: Whether the interaction should operate on the special first initialization tick after worldgen (when dependency cycles are not allowed).
trans-unit.target: Ob die Interaktion mit dem speziellen ersten Initialisierungs-Tick nach "worldgen" arbeiten soll (wenn die Abhängigkeitszyklen nicht erlaubt sind).

trans-unit.id: The proportion of the layer that spreads to the adjacent locations each tick (on a flat plain).
trans-unit.source: The proportion of the layer that spreads to the adjacent locations each tick (on a flat plain).
trans-unit.target: Der Anteil der Ebene, der sich pro Tick zu den benachbarten Stellen ausbreitet (auf einer flachen Ebene).

trans-unit.id: The degree to which the spread prefers going downhill. 0 = ignores height, 1 = never spreads uphill, -1 = never spreads downhill.
trans-unit.source: The degree to which the spread prefers going downhill. 0 = ignores height, 1 = never spreads uphill, -1 = never spreads downhill.
trans-unit.target: Der Grad, zu dem die Strecke den Abstieg bevorzugt. 0 = ignoriert die Höhe, 1 = breitet sich nie bergauf aus, -1 = breitet sich nie bergab aus.

trans-unit.id: The number of times this interaction should be ticked after its modified layer has otherwise been initialized (but before it is used by any other interactions).
trans-unit.source: The number of times this interaction should be ticked after its modified layer has otherwise been initialized (but before it is used by any other interactions).
trans-unit.target: Die Häufigkeit, mit der diese Interaktion aktiviert werden soll, nachdem ihr geänderter Ebenen anderweitig initialisiert wurde (aber bevor sie von anderen Interaktionen verwendet wird).

trans-unit.id: The name of the layer that defines habitability for this species.
trans-unit.source: The name of the layer that defines habitability for this species.
trans-unit.target: Der Name der Ebene, die die Bewohnbarkeit für diese Art definiert.

trans-unit.id: Percent per-tick that the population of neighbors flows into a location.
trans-unit.source: Percent per-tick that the population of neighbors flows into a location.
trans-unit.target: Prozent pro Tick, dass die Bevölkerung der Nachbarn in einen Ort fließt.

trans-unit.id: Throttle that weights the percent-change per turn.
trans-unit.source: Throttle that weights the percent-change per turn.
trans-unit.target: Drossel, die die prozentuale Veränderung pro Runde gewichtet.

trans-unit.id: How the two layers are combined.
trans-unit.source: How the two layers are combined.
trans-unit.target: Wie die zwei Ebenen kombiniert werden.

trans-unit.id: The layers involved in the combination.
trans-unit.source: The layers involved in the combination.
trans-unit.target: Die Ebenen, die an der Kombination beteiligt sind.

trans-unit.id: The weights of the layers in the final product/sum.
trans-unit.source: The weights of the layers in the final product/sum.
trans-unit.target: Die Gewichte der Ebenen im Endprodukt / Summe.

trans-unit.id: New values are throttled to change by this percentage per tick at max.
trans-unit.source: New values are throttled to change by this percentage per tick at max.
trans-unit.target: Neue Werte werden gedrosselt, um sich maximal um diesen Prozentsatz pro Tick zu ändern.

trans-unit.id: The rate of decay by flat value per tick. Applied before percent decay.
trans-unit.source: The rate of decay by flat value per tick. Applied before percent decay.
trans-unit.target: Die Rate des Verfalls durch einen flachen Wert pro Tick. Vor prozentualem Zerfall angewendet.

trans-unit.id: The rate of decay by percent per tick. Applied after flat decay.
trans-unit.source: The rate of decay by percent per tick. Applied after flat decay.
trans-unit.target: Die Zerfallsrate in Prozent pro Tick. Nach flachem Verfall angewendet.

trans-unit.id: A tile will approach this percentage value of its highest-value neighbor.
trans-unit.source: A tile will approach this percentage value of its highest-value neighbor.
trans-unit.target: Eine Kachel nähert sich diesem Prozentwert ihres höchstwertigen Nachbarn.

trans-unit.id: Spread-rate drops to zero as height difference approaches this value.
trans-unit.source: Spread-rate drops to zero as height difference approaches this value.
trans-unit.target: Die Spread-Rate fällt auf Null, wenn sich der Höhenunterschied diesem Wert nähert.

trans-unit.id: The value approaches the desire value at this rate.
trans-unit.source: The value approaches the desire value at this rate.
trans-unit.target: Der Wert nähert sich dem Wunschwert mit dieser Rate.

trans-unit.id: Base layer which determines the min-value of a location.

trans-unit.target: Basisebene, die den Mindestwert eines Ortes bestimmt.

trans-unit.target: Eine Kombination aus einem kleinen Zelt und einem winzigen Lager.

trans-unit.id: New players are welcome to join
trans-unit.source: New players are welcome to join

trans-unit.source: To get the best server matches, select the times you're most likely to play.
trans-unit.target: Wähle deine Zeiten aus, an denen du am meisten spielst, um die besten Servervorschläge zu bekommen.

trans-unit.target: Bitte geben Sie einen Dienstnamen und eine URL ein

trans-unit.id: Impact in:\n3 days 10 hrs 13 min, 12 sec.
trans-unit.source: Impact in:\n3 days 10 hrs 13 min, 12 sec.
trans-unit.target: Einschlag in:\n3 Tagen 10 Std. 13 Min, 12 Sek.

trans-unit.source: This law only applies while in its zone (view in browser)
trans-unit.target: Dieses Gesetz gilt nur in seiner Zone (im Browser anzeigen)

trans-unit.id: Max days played for citizens to be eligible:
trans-unit.source: Max days played for citizens to be eligible:
trans-unit.target: Maximal Spielzeit in Tagen mit der Bürger anspruchsberechtigt sind:

trans-unit.note: Chat command shortcut/Parameter for chat command /turnon

trans-unit.id: Note: It's recommended that you begin your first game with other citizens in a shared world for the best experience.
trans-unit.source: Note: It's recommended that you begin your first game with other citizens in a shared world for the best experience.
trans-unit.target: Hinweis: Für das beste Erlebnis wird empfohlen, das erste Spiel mit anderen Bürgern in einer gemeinsamen Welt zu beginnen.

trans-unit.id: No holes in the roof at all
trans-unit.source: No holes in the roof at all

trans-unit.id: Many crafting station in Eco require enclosed rooms to work.
trans-unit.source: Many crafting station in Eco require enclosed rooms to work.
trans-unit.target: Viele Craftingstationen in Eco erfordern geschlossene Räumen um zu funktionieren.

trans-unit.id: Building requires both a hammer and a material to place blocks.
trans-unit.source: Building requires both a hammer and a material to place blocks.
trans-unit.target: Bauen erfordert sowohl einen Hammer als auch Material, um Blöcke zu platzieren.
Text und Log\nin die Zwischenablage kopieren

trans-unit.id: Are you sure you want to quit?
trans-unit.source: Are you sure you want to quit?

trans-unit.id: Retrieve the {0} from your tent and select it.
trans-unit.source: Retrieve the {0} from your tent and select it.
trans-unit.target: Hol dir die {0} von deinem Zelt und wähle sie aus.

trans-unit.id: Mouse over this text link to view how to build or find a research table: {0}
trans-unit.source: Mouse over this text link to view how to build or find a research table: {0}
trans-unit.target: Fahre mit dem Mauszeiger über den Text, um zu sehen wie du einen Forschungstisch baust oder findest: {0}

trans-unit.id: You can join the conversation with your fellow citizens through this link:
trans-unit.source: You can join the conversation with your fellow citizens through this link:
trans-unit.target: Du kannst der Konversation mit deinen Mitbürgern/innen über diesem Link beitreten:

trans-unit.id: Carrying capacity is limited and you can only carry one load of dirt at a time. Later, you can use vehicles to carry more.
trans-unit.source: Carrying capacity is limited and you can only carry one load of dirt at a time. Later, you can use vehicles to carry more.
trans-unit.target: Die Traglast ist beschränkt und du kannst nur eine Ladung Erde auf einmal tragen. Später kannst du Fahrzeuge nutzen, um mehr auf einmal zu tragen.

trans-unit.id: Place the dirt by right-clicking a location.
trans-unit.source: Place the dirt by right-clicking a location.
trans-unit.target: Lege die Erde ab, indem du mit der rechten Maustaste auf einen beliebigen Ort klickst.

trans-unit.id: To obtain an undiscovered skill, you'll need to craft skillbooks at a Research Table.
trans-unit.source: To obtain an undiscovered skill, you'll need to craft skillbooks at a Research Table.
trans-unit.target: Um eine unentdeckte Fertigkeit zu erhalten, musst du Fertigkeitsbücher am Forschungstisch herstellen.

trans-unit.id: You may need to wait until it orbits to this side of the world.
trans-unit.source: You may need to wait until it orbits to this side of the world.
trans-unit.target: Du musst vielleicht warten, bis er an dieser Seite der Welt angekommen ist.

trans-unit.id: Since all your resources to do this come from the environment, you could very well destroy the planet before the meteor even impacts.
trans-unit.source: Since all your resources to do this come from the environment, you could very well destroy the planet before the meteor even impacts.
trans-unit.target: Da alle deine Ressourcen aus der Umwelt stammen, könnte es sehr gut passieren, dass du den Planeten zerstörst, bevor der Meteor überhaupt einschlägt.

trans-unit.id: To navigate these twin dangers, you'll need to collaborate with your fellow citizens to build a thriving economy tempered by a well-run government.
trans-unit.source: To navigate these twin dangers, you'll need to collaborate with your fellow citizens to build a thriving economy tempered by a well-run government.
trans-unit.target: Um diese zwei Gefahren zu bewältigen, musst du mit deinen Mitbürgern zusammenarbeiten, um eine blühende Wirtschaft aufzubauen, die von einer gut geführten Regierung geregelt wird.

trans-unit.id: Together with your fellow citizens, you'll need to advance civilization to a level of technology capable of stopping the meteor.
trans-unit.source: Together with your fellow citizens, you'll need to advance civilization to a level of technology capable of stopping the meteor.
trans-unit.target: Zusammen mit deinen Mitbürgern musst du die Zivilisation auf ein technisches Niveau bringen, die den Meteor aufhalten kann.

trans-unit.id: You'll advance technology and acquire massive power over the environment.
trans-unit.source: You'll advance technology and acquire massive power over the environment.
trans-unit.target: Du wirst in der Technologie voranschreiten und massive Macht über die Umwelt erlangen.

trans-unit.id: You'll create cities, markets, and a thriving industry.
trans-unit.source: You'll create cities, markets, and a thriving industry.
trans-unit.target: Du erstellst Städte, Märkte und eine blühende Industrie.

trans-unit.id: You'll elect leaders and pass laws to grow your economy and protect the ecosystem.
trans-unit.source: You'll elect leaders and pass laws to grow your economy and protect the ecosystem.
trans-unit.target: Du wählst Ämter und stimmst für Gesetze, um deine Wirtschaft wachsen zu lassen und das Ökosystem zu schützen.

trans-unit.id: You are not the owner of this deed.
trans-unit.source: You are not the owner of this deed.
trans-unit.target: Du bist nicht der Eigentümer dieser Besitzurkunde.

trans-unit.id: Players can give or take up to 10 reputation per day, and each day it replenishes up to 10.\n\nReputation allows you to see how a player has interacted with others in the world, using that information to make decisions.
trans-unit.source: Players can give or take up to 10 reputation per day, and each day it replenishes up to 10.\n\nReputation allows you to see how a player has interacted with others in the world, using that information to make decisions.
trans-unit.target: Spieler können bis zu 10 positive oder negative Reputationspunkte am Tag vergeben und an jedem neuem Tag werden diese wieder auf 10 aufgefüllt.\n\nReputation zeigt an, wie ein Spieler mit anderen Spielern in der Welt interagiert hat. Verwende diese Informationen, um Entscheidungen zu treffen.

trans-unit.source: Plant to grow a palm tree.

trans-unit.source: Plant to grow a big bluestem plant.

trans-unit.id: Plant to grow an agave plant.
trans-unit.source: Plant to grow an agave plant.

trans-unit.id: A soft rock, with few potential uses. Shale is a sedimentary rock formed by thin layers of compacted clay or mud.
trans-unit.source: A soft rock, with few potential uses. Shale is a sedimentary rock formed by thin layers of compacted clay or mud.
trans-unit.target: Ein weiches Gestein mit einigen nützlichen Anwendungen. Schiefer ist ein Sedimentgestein, das aus dünnen und komprimierten Lagen Lehm und Schlamm besteht.

trans-unit.id: A chemical compound used in steel production.
trans-unit.source: A chemical compound used in steel production.
trans-unit.target: Eine chemische Komponente, die in der Stahlherstellung benutzt wird.

trans-unit.id: A hard rock useful for construction and industrial processes. Limestone is sedimentary, forming mostly from the fallen compacted remains of marine organisms.
trans-unit.source: A hard rock useful for construction and industrial processes. Limestone is sedimentary, forming mostly from the fallen compacted remains of marine organisms.
trans-unit.target: Ein harter Stein, der für den Bau und industrielle Verarbeitungen nützlich ist. Kalkstein ist ein Sedimentgestein, das hauptsächlich aus den verfestigten zerfallenen Überresten von Meeresorganismen entsteht.

trans-unit.id: A hard rock useful for construction, and host to various ores. Granite forms from cooling magma deep underground. It is the most common continental rock type!
trans-unit.source: A hard rock useful for construction, and host to various ores. Granite forms from cooling magma deep underground. It is the most common continental rock type!
trans-unit.target: Ein harter Stein, der für den Bau nützlich ist und diverse Erze enthält. Granit entsteht aus erkaltendem Magma tief unter der Erde. Er ist der häufigste kontinentale Gesteinstyp!

trans-unit.id: A hard rock with some uses in construction. Gneiss is a metamorphic rock formed from previous rock recrystallizing at high pressures and temperatures deep in the earth.
trans-unit.source: A hard rock with some uses in construction. Gneiss is a metamorphic rock formed from previous rock recrystallizing at high pressures and temperatures deep in the earth.
trans-unit.target: Ein harter Stein mit einigen Anwendungen im Bau. Gneis ist ein metamorphes Gestein, das aus früheren Steinen entsteht, die unter hohem Druck und Temperaturen tief unter der Erde umkristallisieren.

trans-unit.id: A very fine grained deposit of weathered bits of rock. Plastic when wet and brittle when dry, clay is impermeable to many liquids and useful for many industrial and environmental purposes.
trans-unit.source: A very fine grained deposit of weathered bits of rock. Plastic when wet and brittle when dry, clay is impermeable to many liquids and useful for many industrial and environmental purposes.
trans-unit.target: Ein sehr feinkörnige Ablagerung von verwitterten Gesteinsstücken. Bei Nässe formbar und brüchig bei Trockenheit, ist Ton undurchlässig für viele Flüssigkeiten und nützlich für viele industrielle und ökologische Zwecke.

trans-unit.id: A hard and heavy rock with some uses in construction. Basalt forms directly from lava erupted volcanically, making it an extrusive igneous rock. The basis of all bedrock in the oceans.
trans-unit.source: A hard and heavy rock with some uses in construction. Basalt forms directly from lava erupted volcanically, making it an extrusive igneous rock. The basis of all bedrock in the oceans.
trans-unit.target: Ein harter und schwerer Stein mit einigen Anwendungen im Bau. Basalt entsteht direkt aus Lava, die vulkanisch ausgebrochen ist, was ihn zu einem extrusiven Eruptivgestein macht. Die Basis des ganzen Grundgesteins in den Meeren.

trans-unit.id: A homely recipe made from a mix of cooked rice and fruit. Not only is it friendly, but it also happens to be pan fried.
trans-unit.source: A homely recipe made from a mix of cooked rice and fruit. Not only is it friendly, but it also happens to be pan fried.
trans-unit.target: Ein Wohlfühlrezept bestehend aus einem Mix von gekochtem Reis und Obst. Es ist nicht nur freundlich, sondern auch gebraten.

trans-unit.id: Example crafting table that uses liquids.
trans-unit.source: Example crafting table that uses liquids.
trans-unit.target: Beispiel Tisch zum Herstellen mit Flüssigkeiten.

trans-unit.id: Unable to export game to S3: {0}\n{1}
trans-unit.source: Unable to export game to S3: {0}\n{1}
trans-unit.target: Export des Spiels zu S3: {0}\n{1} nicht möglich

trans-unit.id: Prevent removal if no resources would be gained.
trans-unit.source: Prevent removal if no resources would be gained.
trans-unit.target: Verhindere Löschung, wenn keine Ressourcen dabei zurückbleiben.

trans-unit.source: How many spawn locations the plant gets relative to the valid area size. Must be < 1.
trans-unit.target: Wie viele Spawngebiete die Pflanze relativ zur gültigen Bereichsgröße bekommt. Muss < 1 sein.

trans-unit.id: How spread the plant spawns are.
trans-unit.source: How spread the plant spawns are.
trans-unit.target: Wie weit die Pflanzenspawns voneinander entfernt verteilt werden.

trans-unit.id: How many plants per spawn point.
trans-unit.source: How many plants per spawn point.

trans-unit.id: {0} unclaimed {1} plots owned by users that haven't logged in for more than {2} days.
trans-unit.source: {0} unclaimed {1} plots owned by users that haven't logged in for more than {2} days.
trans-unit.target: {0} hat den Anspruch auf {1} Parzellen entfernt, welche Nutzer gehörten, die sich seit mehr als {2} Tagen nicht mehr eingeloggt haben.

trans-unit.id: Cannot use for less than 1 day.
trans-unit.source: Cannot use for less than 1 day.
trans-unit.target: Kann nicht für weniger als einen Tag genutzt werden.

trans-unit.id: Chimney pipe must have only one open end, outside of all rooms, and above the object.
trans-unit.source: Chimney pipe must have only one open end, outside of all rooms, and above the object.
trans-unit.target: Das Schornsteinrohr muss mindestens ein offenes Ende außerhalb von allen Räumen und über dem Objekt haben.

trans-unit.id: Nested clause has at least one invalid one sub-clause:{0}
trans-unit.source: Nested clause has at least one invalid one sub-clause:{0}
trans-unit.target: Verschachtelte Klausel hat mindestens eine ungültige Subklausel: {0}

trans-unit.id: Nested clause has no sub-clauses specified.
trans-unit.source: Nested clause has no sub-clauses specified.
trans-unit.target: In der verschachtelten Klausel sind keine Unterklauseln angegeben.

trans-unit.id: Loan a given amount for a set period to another citizen, with interest.\n\nThe borrower can specify the amount they want to borrow, which the lender defines in the 'allowed debt' range.
trans-unit.source: Loan a given amount for a set period to another citizen, with interest.\n\nThe borrower can specify the amount they want to borrow, which the lender defines in the 'allowed debt' range.
trans-unit.target: Verleihen Sie einen bestimmten Betrag für einen festgelegten Zeitraum mit Zinsen an einen anderen Bürger.\n\nDer Darlehensnehmer kann den Betrag angeben, den er ausleihen möchte. Dieser Betrag wird vom Darlehensgeber im Bereich 'Zulässige Schulden' definiert.

trans-unit.id: Sell a bond for a given value, which will be paid back over a set period of time with interest.\n\nThe bond purchaser can choose what value of bond they want to buy, within a range set by the bond seller.
trans-unit.source: Sell a bond for a given value, which will be paid back over a set period of time with interest.\n\nThe bond purchaser can choose what value of bond they want to buy, within a range set by the bond seller.
trans-unit.target: Verkaufen Sie eine Anleihe zu einem bestimmten Wert, die über einen festgelegten Zeitraum mit Zinsen zurückgezahlt wird.\n\nDer Anleihekäufer kann innerhalb eines vom Anleiheverkäufer festgelegten Bereichs den Wert der Anleihe wählen, die er kaufen möchte.

trans-unit.id: Defines a position where a room must be built, with a minimum volume and made of at least the listed materials.\nThe position is marked by a {0}, and you must place one on the location you want the room built.
trans-unit.source: Defines a position where a room must be built, with a minimum volume and made of at least the listed materials.\nThe position is marked by a {0}, and you must place one on the location you want the room built.
trans-unit.target: Definiert eine Position, an der ein Raum gebaut werden muss, mit einem Mindestvolumen und aus mindestens den aufgelisteten Materialien.\nDie Position ist mit einem {0} markiert, und Sie müssen auch einen davon an der Stelle platzieren, an welcher der Raum erstellt werden soll.

trans-unit.id: Defines a road that must be built between points A and B, defined by placing a {0} at each position. The width of the road must be the defined minimum throughout, and it must be made entirely of the listed material.
trans-unit.source: Defines a road that must be built between points A and B, defined by placing a {0} at each position. The width of the road must be the defined minimum throughout, and it must be made entirely of the listed material.
trans-unit.target: Definiert eine Straße, die zwischen den Punkten A und B gebaut werden muss, indem an jeder Position ein {0} eingefügt wird. Die Breite der Straße muss durchgehend das definierte Minimum sein und vollständig aus dem aufgelisteten Material bestehen.

trans-unit.id:
Defines a set of blocks that must exist, or not exist on a property. This can be used for all kinds of things:
 - Removing unwanted plants
 - Removing pollution
 - Planting fields (planted blocks must exist)
 - Removing structures or obstacles.

If {0} is checked, only surface blocks will be examined. Otherwise, blocks to a depth of {1} below the highest block will be examined.
trans-unit.source:
Defines a set of blocks that must exist, or not exist on a property. This can be used for all kinds of things:
 - Removing unwanted plants
 - Removing pollution
 - Planting fields (planted blocks must exist)
 - Removing structures or obstacles.

If {0} is checked, only surface blocks will be examined. Otherwise, blocks to a depth of {1} below the highest block will be examined.
trans-unit.target:
Definiert eine Gruppe von Blöcken, welche auf einem Grundstück vorhanden sein müssen oder nicht. Dies kann für alle Arten von Dingen verwendet werden:
 - Entfernen von ungewollten Pflanzen
 - Entfernung von Verschmutzung
 - Felder bepflanzen (bepflanzte Blöcke müssen existieren)
 - Entfernung von Strukturen oder Hindernissen.

Wenn {0} aktiviert ist, werden nur Oberflächenblöcke untersucht. Andernfalls werden Blöcke bis zu einer Tiefe von {1} unter dem höchsten Block untersucht.

trans-unit.id: Add blocks from the property at {0} until there are more than {1}.
trans-unit.source: Add blocks from the property at {0} until there are more than {1}.
trans-unit.target: Füge Blöcke aus der Eigenschaft bei {0} hinzu, bis mehr als {1} vorhanden sind.

trans-unit.id: Drag the {0} to your toolbar and select it.
trans-unit.source: Drag the {0} to your toolbar and select it.
trans-unit.target: Ziehe die {0} in deine Werkzeugleiste und wähle sie aus.

trans-unit.id: The World will be on Pause if this option is set
trans-unit.source: The World will be on Pause if this option is set
trans-unit.target: Die Welt wird angehalten, wenn dies eingeschaltet ist

trans-unit.id: The World will resume as soon as first player login to the world
trans-unit.source: The World will resume as soon as first player login to the world
trans-unit.target: Die Welt wird fortgesetzt, sobald sich der erste Spieler in der Welt anmeldet

trans-unit.source: Can't pick up with current tool

trans-unit.source: Special kind of backup which always contains current 'HEAD' state and overwrites every time. It happens often enough to minimize data lose
trans-unit.target: Besondere Art der Sicherung die immer den aktuellsten Stand enthält und jedes Mal überschrieben wird. Die Sicherung erfolgt häufig genug um Datenverlust zu minimieren
Du kannst nicht unendlich hierhin überweisen!

trans-unit.source: Finish the tutorial or skip it before you can access your skills.
trans-unit.target: Beende das Tutorial oder überspringe es, bevor du auf deine Fertigkeiten zugreifen kannst.

trans-unit.id: A place to create fishing poles, traps and prepare seafood.
trans-unit.source: A place to create fishing poles, traps and prepare seafood.
trans-unit.target: Ein Ort zum Erstellen von Angelruten, Fallen und zum Zubereiten von Meeresfrüchten.

trans-unit.source: Allows players to create and use bank accounts.
